task_completion.description: Open the target presentation in LibreOffice Impress
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Impress is open and the file 'esg_report.odp' is loaded, showing slides with gray shapes and black text.

task_completion.description: Recolor all rectangle shapes to Forest Green
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rectangles (2 per slide) are changed from gray to a dark green color (Hex: #2E7D32). Look for the color properties panel or the visual change on the slides.

task_completion.description: Recolor all ellipse/circle shapes to Amber
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ellipses/circles (1 per slide) are changed from gray to an amber/orange-yellow color (Hex: #FF8F00).

task_completion.description: Recolor all slide title text to Dark Blue
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text of the slide titles is changed from black to a dark blue color (Hex: #0D47A1). The text formatting properties should reflect this change.

task_completion.description: Do not modify body text or other elements
task_completion.visual_evidence: The body text on the slides remains in its original state (black) and has not been recolored or deleted.

task_completion.description: Save the changes to the presentation
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks 'File -> Save', uses the save icon, or the window title bar no longer shows an unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk).

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Impress GUI to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the LibreOffice Impress interface, such as selecting shapes, opening the properties sidebar, and using the color picker.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by editing the underlying XML files
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) open showing the unzipped 'content.xml' of the .odp file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a Python script or terminal command to modify the file
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show execution of scripts (e.g., python, bash) that directly manipulate the .odp file's contents.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The presentation is located at '/home/ga/Documents/Presentations/esg_report.odp' and contains exactly 4 slides. Each slide has exactly 2 rectangles and 1 ellipse. Initially, all shapes are gray (#C0C0C0) and titles are black (#000000). The target colors are specific hex codes: Rectangles must be #2E7D32 (dark green), Ellipses must be #FF8F00 (amber/orange), and Titles must be #0D47A1 (dark blue).
